title: More Nonsense Limerick 70
content:
There was an old man of Ancona,
    Who found a small dog with no owner,
    Which he took up and down 
    All the streets of the town,
    That anxious old man of Ancona.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 70" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
